title: Better MC [FORGE] - BMC4
description: Version 1.20.1 | A Proper Vanilla+ Modpack | Don't play Vanilla play this!
body:
![In purple text and white text, "BETTER MINECRAFT" is displayed infront of a screenshot of the Minecraft Overworld. The background image has a tree with purple leaves on both sides.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc76c836ab354e79660c2f5d81a13a87396a2f38.jpeg)

![In all-caps bold text, the word "FEATURES". ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

✔️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-mc-forge-bmc4)

✔️ 100+ Quests

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation ([Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic))

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ Overhauled Stronghold & Fortresses

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs ([Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs), [Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm))

✔️ Thousands of NEW Dungeons & Structures ([When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [AdoraBuild: Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorabuild-structures))

✔️ The Aether Dimension with Many Tweaks and Additions ([Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether), [Aether Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux), [Aether Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-villages))

✔️ QoL Features such as [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [ XP Tomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/xp-tome)

✔️ [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) with Additional Features

✔️ [Rideable Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-legacy/)

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience

✔️ Built-in, [Free World Sharing](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tLTC6wYcWVM)

✔️ [270+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/64026/better-mc-forge-bmc4)

[![Live count of how many members are online in the Luna Pixel Studios discord server.](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=0843bf&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)
